entries.long_en: A workflow skill for creating complex claude.ai HTML artifacts that need state management, routing, or the full shadcn/ui component library. Provides init-artifact.sh (scaffolds a Vite + React + Tailwind + shadcn project with 40+ pre-installed components) and bundle-artifact.sh (Parcel-based bundler that inlines all JS/CSS into one HTML file). Requires Node.js 18+ and npm. Not intended for simple single-file JSX; use the built-in artifact tool for those.
entries.long_zh: 用于创建需要状态管理、路由或完整 shadcn/ui 组件库的复杂 claude.ai HTML 产物。提供 init-artifact.sh（搭建含 40+ 预装组件的 Vite + React + Tailwind + shadcn 项目）和 bundle-artifact.sh（基于 Parcel 的打包器，将所有 JS/CSS 内联为单一 HTML 文件）。需要 Node.js 18+ 和 npm。不适用于简单的单文件 JSX，那种情况请使用内置产物工具。
entries.sec_note_en: Proprietary: © Anthropic, PBC (per-skill LICENSE.txt) — use is governed by your Anthropic agreement; copying outside Anthropic's Services, derivative works, and third-party redistribution are explicitly prohibited. Executes shell scripts (init-artifact.sh, bundle-artifact.sh) that run npm install and Parcel; requires Node.js 18+ and npm. Installs npm packages (including Radix UI, Tailwind, shadcn/ui) into a local project directory during build. Runs locally.
entries.sec_note_zh: 专有许可 © Anthropic, PBC（各技能目录内 LICENSE.txt）：使用受你与 Anthropic 的协议约束；明确禁止在 Anthropic Services 之外保留副本、创建衍生作品或向第三方转分发。执行 shell 脚本（init-artifact.sh、bundle-artifact.sh），内部运行 npm install 和 Parcel，需要 Node.js 18+ 和 npm。构建期间会将 npm 包（包括 Radix UI、Tailwind、shadcn/ui）安装到本地项目目录。

entries.name: Web App Testing
entries.author: anthropics
entries.description_en: Tests local web applications using native Python Playwright scripts, supporting screenshot capture, DOM inspection, console log reading, and server lifecycle management.
entries.description_zh: 通过原生 Python Playwright 脚本测试本地 Web 应用，支持截图、DOM 检查、控制台日志读取及服务器生命周期管理。
entries.long_en: A Playwright-based skill for verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, and automating local web app interactions. Follows a reconnaissance-then-action pattern: navigate, wait for networkidle, inspect the rendered DOM or take a screenshot, identify selectors, then execute actions. Bundles a with_server.py helper that manages one or more dev-server processes. Can handle both static HTML (via file:// URLs) and dynamic single-page apps. Requires Python, the playwright package, and Playwright browser binaries installed separately.
entries.long_zh: 基于 Playwright 的技能，用于验证前端功能、调试 UI 行为和自动化本地 Web 应用交互。遵循「侦察后行动」模式：导航、等待 networkidle、检查渲染 DOM 或截图、识别选择器、执行操作。内置 with_server.py 辅助脚本，可管理一个或多个开发服务器进程。支持静态 HTML（file:// URL）和动态单页应用。需要 Python、playwright 包以及单独安装的 Playwright 浏览器二进制文件。
entries.sec_note_en: Proprietary: © Anthropic, PBC (per-skill LICENSE.txt) — use is governed by your Anthropic agreement; copying outside Anthropic's Services, derivative works, and third-party redistribution are explicitly prohibited. Drives a real Chromium browser via Playwright; requires Python, the `playwright` package (`pip install playwright`), and browser binaries (`playwright install chromium`). Executes Python scripts and can start local dev servers as subprocesses. Interacts only with localhost; no external network calls from the skill itself. Runs locally.
entries.sec_note_zh: 专有许可 © Anthropic, PBC（各技能目录内 LICENSE.txt）：使用受你与 Anthropic 的协议约束；明确禁止在 Anthropic Services 之外保留副本、创建衍生作品或向第三方转分发。通过 Playwright 驱动真实 Chromium 浏览器，需要 Python、`playwright` 包（`pip install playwright`）及浏览器二进制文件（`playwright install chromium`）。执行 Python 脚本，可作为子进程启动本地开发服务器。仅与 localhost 交互，技能本身不发起外部网络请求。

entries.name: XLSX
entries.author: anthropics
entries.description_en: Create, read, and edit Excel (.xlsx) spreadsheets with pandas for data analysis and openpyxl for formulas, formatting, and multi-sheet workbooks.
entries.description_zh: 使用 pandas 进行数据分析、openpyxl 处理公式与格式，创建、读取和编辑 Excel (.xlsx) 电子表格，支持多工作表和财务模型。
entries.long_en: Covers reading spreadsheet data with pandas (bulk ops, statistics, multi-sheet import), creating and editing workbooks with openpyxl (Excel formulas, cell styling, column sizing, sheet management), and recalculating formula values via a bundled `scripts/recalc.py` that drives LibreOffice in headless mode. Includes financial model conventions: industry-standard color coding for inputs/formulas/cross-sheet links, number formatting rules, and a formula verification checklist. Install from `skills/xlsx`; required: `pip install pandas openpyxl`; LibreOffice must be installed for formula recalculation.
entries.long_zh: 涵盖使用 pandas 读取电子表格数据（批量操作、统计分析、多表导入）；使用 openpyxl 创建和编辑工作簿（Excel 公式、单元格样式、列宽、工作表管理）；以及通过内置的 `scripts/recalc.py` 以无头模式调用 LibreOffice 重新计算公式。包含财务模型规范：输入/公式/跨表链接的行业标准色彩编码、数字格式规则和公式验证清单。从 `skills/xlsx` 安装；所需：`pip install pandas openpyxl`；公式重算需要安装 LibreOffice。
entries.sec_note_en: Proprietary: © Anthropic, PBC (per-skill LICENSE.txt) — use is governed by your Anthropic agreement; copying outside Anthropic's Services, derivative works, and third-party redistribution are explicitly prohibited. Dependencies: pandas, openpyxl (pip); LibreOffice (soffice) required for formula recalculation via scripts/recalc.py. All operations are local; no network calls at runtime. The recalc script invokes LibreOffice as a subprocess and writes a temporary macro on first run.
entries.sec_note_zh: 专有许可 © Anthropic, PBC（各技能目录内 LICENSE.txt）：使用受你与 Anthropic 的协议约束；明确禁止在 Anthropic Services 之外保留副本、创建衍生作品或向第三方转分发。依赖项：pandas、openpyxl（pip）；公式重算需要 LibreOffice（soffice），通过 scripts/recalc.py 调用。所有操作均为本地处理，运行时不访问网络。recalc 脚本首次运行时会写入临时宏，并以子进程方式调用 LibreOffice。

entries.name: Superpowers
entries.author: obra
entries.description_en: Claude Code plugin bundling a complete software development methodology: TDD, systematic debugging, brainstorming, planning, subagent-driven development, code review, and git worktree workflows.
entries.description_zh: Claude Code 插件，内置完整软件开发方法论：TDD、系统化调试、头脑风暴、规划、子 agent 驱动开发、代码评审与 git worktree 工作流。
entries.long_en: Superpowers is a Claude Code plugin (also available for Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, and others) that registers skills invocable by name and hooks that activate them automatically at session start. The core workflow—brainstorming → design approval → writing-plans → subagent-driven-development → test-driven-development → requesting-code-review → finishing-a-development-branch—runs largely without manual triggering. Skills include: brainstorming, writing-plans, executing-plans, subagent-driven-development, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, verification-before-completion, requesting/receiving-code-review, using-git-worktrees, dispatching-parallel-agents, and writing-skills. Ships hooks/ and local scripts that run in your environment.
entries.long_zh: Superpowers 是一个 Claude Code 插件（同时支持 Cursor、Codex、Gemini CLI 等），注册可按名调用的技能并在会话启动时通过钩子自动激活。核心工作流——头脑风暴 → 设计确认 → 写计划 → 子 agent 驱动开发 → 测试驱动开发 → 请求代码评审 → 收尾分支——基本无需手动触发。技能包括：brainstorming、writing-plans、executing-plans、subagent-driven-development、test-driven-development、systematic-debugging、verification-before-completion、requesting/receiving-code-review、using-git-worktrees、dispatching-parallel-agents 与 writing-skills。随附在本地环境运行的 hooks/ 与脚本。
entries.sec_note_en: MIT-licensed. Installs as a Claude Code plugin that registers session-start hooks and runs local scripts—review the hooks/ and scripts/ directories before enabling. The skills themselves are methodology and process only; no external service calls by default. An optional brainstorming visual companion loads a logo from primeradiant.com (version string included, no project details); disable via SUPERPOWERS_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=true.
entries.sec_note_zh: MIT 许可。作为 Claude Code 插件安装，会注册 session 启动钩子并运行本地脚本——启用前请审查 hooks/ 与 scripts/ 目录。技能本身仅为方法论与流程指引，默认不调用外部服务。brainstorming 的可选视觉伴侣功能会从 primeradiant.com 加载 logo（含版本号，不含项目内容），可通过 SUPERPOWERS_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=true 禁用。

entries.name: GEO Brand Knowledge Graph
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: Turns company materials, official sites, products, cases and people into an evidence-backed brand entity knowledge graph, outputting entity/relation lists, a disambiguation table, confidence tiers, Mermaid diagrams, JSON-LD, RDF triples and Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown reports.
entries.description_zh: 把企业资料、官网、产品、客户案例和人物整理成有证据支撑的品牌实体知识图谱，输出实体/关系清单、消歧表、可信等级、Mermaid 图、JSON-LD、RDF 三元组以及 Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown 报告。
entries.long_en: Build a consistent, evidence-traceable brand knowledge graph to power GEO content, page structure and AI-answer consistency.
entries.long_zh: 构建一致、可溯源的品牌知识图谱，为 GEO 内容、页面结构和 AI 答案一致性治理提供底座。
entries.sec_note_en: Bundles two Python scripts: render_yao_geo_brand_graph.py builds Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown plus a quality-report.json from a structured report_input.json, and collect_source_validation.py samples source-URL reachability/page titles (needs network access when run). Reads a source ledger and structured input; writes report files locally. No private/vendor-system dependency; every relation edge requires an evidence ID.
entries.sec_note_zh: 捆绑两个 Python 脚本：render_yao_geo_brand_graph.py 从结构化 report_input.json 生成 Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown 及 quality-report.json，collect_source_validation.py 会采样来源 URL 的可达性与页面标题（运行时需要联网）。读取来源账本与结构化输入，本地写出报告文件。不依赖任何私有/厂商系统；每条关系边都必须带证据 ID。

entries.name: GEO Comparison Builder
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: Generates evidence-bound, same-criteria GEO brand-comparison content (vs pages, alternatives, selection pages, FAQ) with a decision-dimension model, source ledger, and scoring matrix, delivered as Word, PDF, HTML, and Markdown.
entries.description_zh: 生成证据绑定、同口径的 GEO 品牌对比内容（vs 页、替代方案、选型页、FAQ），含决策维度模型、来源台账与评分矩阵，并交付 Word、PDF、HTML、Markdown 四格式。
entries.long_en: Build fair, source-anchored brand comparisons for domestic AI platforms without disparaging competitors or making unverified claims.
entries.long_zh: 为国内 AI 平台构建公平、来源锚定的品牌对比，不贬损竞品、不输出未经核验的结论。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization, not competitor smearing or detection evasion. Bundles a Python DOCX layout checker (check_docx_layout.py) for table overflow. Real-data modes (public web, user files, authorized connectors/API, AI-platform sampling) are declared per run; it explicitly must not read logged-in, paywalled, internal-system, or personal data, and unverifiable market-share/customer-count/price claims must be dropped or downgraded. Web access only when public-web or connector mode is enabled.
entries.sec_note_zh: 白帽内容优化，非诋毁竞品或检测规避。捆绑 Python DOCX 版式检查脚本（check_docx_layout.py）检测表格溢出。每次运行声明真实数据模式（公开网页、用户文件、授权连接器/API、AI 平台采样）；明确不得读取登录后、付费、内部系统或个人数据，无法核验的市场份额/客户数/价格须删除或降级。仅在启用公开网页或连接器模式时联网。

entries.name: GEO Content Refiner
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: Refactors existing SEO articles, WeChat posts, white papers, or product-page copy into GEO-friendly, AI-citable content, outputting an original GEO score, refined article, before/after diff, atomic fact cards, FAQ, and a four-format report.
entries.description_zh: 把已有 SEO 文章、公众号稿、白皮书或产品页文案改造成 GEO 友好、AI 可引用的内容，输出原文 GEO 评分、改造版文章、改造前后差异、原子事实卡、FAQ 及四格式报告。
entries.long_en: Upgrade existing copy for AI extractability and citation with atomic facts, structure, and evidence grading across eight GEO dimensions.
entries.long_zh: 用原子事实、结构补强与证据分级，按八个 GEO 维度提升已有文案的 AI 可抽取性与可引用性。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization for AI answer engines, not detection evasion. Works from user-supplied source text and sources; it must not invent data, prices, or cases without sources, and must not access logged-in backends, paid databases, private APIs, or personal data without authorization. Optional web verification only when the operator allows it. Reference docs describe data-access and verification rules; layout rules govern DOCX/PDF table handling.
entries.sec_note_zh: 面向 AI 答案引擎的白帽内容优化，非检测规避。基于用户提供的原文与来源工作；无来源时不得虚构数据、价格或案例，未经授权不得访问登录后台、付费数据库、私有 API 或个人数据。仅在操作者允许时可选联网核验。参考文档说明数据访问与核验规则，版式规则约束 DOCX/PDF 表格处理。

entries.name: GEO Effect Monitor
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: Designs a GEO answer-monitoring plan for Chinese answer engines (DeepSeek, Doubao, Qianwen, Kimi, Tencent Yuanbao): per-platform sampling specs, a prompt library, a six-layer metric system, citation-source tracking, a cautious attribution framework, a brand-fact correction loop, alert/threshold rules, dashboard fields and a DB/API draft, delivered as Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown reports.
entries.description_zh: 为国内 AI 答案引擎（DeepSeek、豆包、千问、Kimi、腾讯元宝）设计 GEO 答案监测方案：各平台独立采样口径、Prompt 库、六层指标体系、引用源追踪、谨慎归因框架、品牌事实纠偏闭环、阈值告警规则、仪表盘字段与数据库/API 草案，并交付 Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown 报告。
entries.long_en: A long-running GEO measurement loop that tracks brand visibility, factuality and citation quality in AI answers, with disciplined, evidence-graded attribution.
entries.long_zh: 面向长期运营的 GEO 测量闭环，追踪 AI 答案中的品牌可见性、事实准确性与引用质量，并做有证据分级的谨慎归因。
entries.sec_note_en: This is legitimate measurement/analytics: its methodology involves SAMPLING AI platform answers (recording raw answer text, citation links, screenshots, exports and the sampling environment) to compute brand-appearance, recommendation, accuracy and citation-quality metrics. It explicitly forbids bypassing platform limits, bulk over-scraping, faking human login, or violating terms of service, and requires any bulk automation to declare frequency, permissions and a human-review boundary. No bundled scripts (template/reference-driven); output is a monitoring PLAN plus reports, not a crawler. Actual sampling requires web/platform access; results without auditable raw samples must be marked synthetic or pending.
entries.sec_note_zh: 属于正当的测量/分析：其方法学涉及对 AI 平台答案进行采样（记录答案原文、引用链接、截图、导出文件与采样环境），用于计算品牌出现率、推荐率、描述准确率和引用质量等指标。明确禁止绕过平台限制、批量滥采、模拟真人登录或违反服务条款，并要求任何批量自动化写明频率、权限与人工复核边界。不含捆绑脚本（以模板/参考驱动）；产物是监测方案与报告，而非爬虫。实际采样需要联网/平台访问；缺少可审计原始样本的结果必须标为合成或待复核。

entries.name: GEO Execution Roadmap
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: Turns an existing GEO diagnosis and opportunity map into a 30/60/90-day execution plan with six project packages (page tech, content matrix, titles, knowledge base, external evidence, monitoring), roles, acceptance metrics, budget, and platform-specific actions for DeepSeek, Doubao, Qwen, Kimi, and Yuanbao, output in four formats.
entries.description_zh: 把已有的 GEO 诊断与机会地图转成 30/60/90 天执行方案，含六个项目包（页面技术、内容矩阵、标题体系、知识库、外部证据、监测闭环）、角色分工、验收指标、预算，以及面向 DeepSeek、豆包、千问、Kimi、元宝的平台化动作，四格式输出。
entries.long_en: Converts GEO findings into an accountable 30/60/90-day roadmap with owners, metrics, and budget so teams can ship content that AI answer engines can cite.
entries.long_zh: 把 GEO 诊断结论落成可问责的 30/60/90 天路线图，明确负责人、指标与预算，让团队产出可被 AI 答案引擎引用的内容。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content planning, not manipulation. Manifest declares requires_web: false; it consumes a prior diagnosis/opportunity map rather than crawling. Bundles a Python3 script (scripts/render_yao_geo_execution_roadmap.py) that renders the four-format (Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown) report from a JSON input and writes a quality-report.json. Reads input JSON and writes report files; default output language is Simplified Chinese.
entries.sec_note_zh: 属白帽内容规划，非操纵。manifest 声明 requires_web: false；它承接已有诊断/机会地图而非自行抓取。打包了一个 Python3 脚本（scripts/render_yao_geo_execution_roadmap.py），从 JSON 输入渲染四格式（Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown）报告并写出 quality-report.json。读取输入 JSON、写出报告文件；默认输出语言为简体中文。

entries.name: GEO Explainer Builder
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: Builds a complete publishable GEO explainer article (how-to, concept explanation, buying guides, pitfalls, FAQ, glossary, evidence grading) plus a data-verification appendix, delivered as Markdown, HTML, Word, and PDF.
entries.description_zh: 生成一篇完整可发布的 GEO 科普文章（How-to、概念解释、选择指南、避坑清单、FAQ、术语表、证据分级）及真实数据核验附录，并交付 Markdown、HTML、Word、PDF 四格式。
entries.long_en: Produce in-depth, citable Chinese explainer content with a self-contained core summary and natural brand placement for domestic AI search platforms.
entries.long_zh: 为国内 AI 搜索平台产出深度、可引用、含上下文无关核心摘要与自然品牌植入的中文科普内容。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization, not AI-detection evasion. Bundles a Python renderer (render_yao_geo_explainer_builder.py) that emits the four formats plus a quality-report.json. The skill itself does not guarantee live web scraping: real data must be supplied by an upper agent's retrieval, user uploads, or an existing knowledge base, with sources recorded; unverified brand/effect/safety claims must be downgraded or removed. Sensitive domains (health, finance, legal) require boundary disclaimers.
entries.sec_note_zh: 白帽内容优化，非 AI 检测规避。捆绑 Python 渲染脚本（render_yao_geo_explainer_builder.py）生成四格式及 quality-report.json。技能本身不保证联网抓取：真实数据须由上层 agent 检索、用户上传或已有知识库提供并登记来源；未经核验的品牌/效果/安全断言须降级或删除。健康、金融、法律等敏感领域须加入边界提醒。

entries.name: GEO Knowledge Base Builder
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: Builds an evidence-backed, auditable GEO brand knowledge base from official sites, product pages, help centers, white papers and trusted third-party sources, outputting a complete entity inventory, fact cards, FAQ, prohibited-expression list, source index with evidence tiers, downstream prompt input packs and a four-format Chinese report (Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF).
entries.description_zh: 从官网、产品页、帮助中心、白皮书和可信第三方来源构建可审计、可复用的 GEO 品牌知识库，输出完整实体清单、事实卡、FAQ、禁用表述清单、带证据等级的来源索引、下游 Prompt 输入包以及四格式中文报告（Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF）。
entries.long_en: A reusable, evidence-tiered brand knowledge base that feeds consistent GEO content, monitoring, page design and customer-service prep for Chinese answer engines.
entries.long_zh: 一份分级证据、可复用的品牌知识库，为面向国内 AI 答案引擎的 GEO 内容、监测、页面设计和客服准备提供一致输入。
entries.sec_note_en: Manifest declares requires_web: true: it collects and verifies public official and third-party sources online, and degrades to user-provided files / manual brief when offline. Bundles a Python renderer (render_four_format.py) that writes Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF plus quality-report.json locally. Separates evidence tiers (A-D) and keeps unverified claims in a pending-confirmation area. This is white-hat content/source organization for Kimi/Qianwen/DeepSeek/Doubao/Yuanbao, not answer manipulation; no private CLI or intranet dependency.
entries.sec_note_zh: manifest 声明 requires_web: true：联网时采集并核验公开官方与第三方来源，离线时降级为基于用户提供文件/人工简报输出。捆绑 Python 渲染器 render_four_format.py，本地生成 Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF 及 quality-report.json。按 A-D 分级证据，未核验声明保留在待确认区。属于面向 Kimi/千问/DeepSeek/豆包/元宝的白帽内容与信源整理，而非操纵 AI 答案；不依赖私有 CLI 或内网。

entries.name: GEO Page Audit
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: Audits a URL or small page set for GEO readiness across crawlability, structure, content evidence, and AI extractability, producing code-layer fixes, content/schema suggestions, an evidence ledger, and a four-format report with a quality-report.json self-check.
entries.description_zh: 针对一个 URL 或少量页面做 GEO 就绪度诊断，覆盖可抓取性、结构、内容证据与 AI 可抽取性，产出代码层修复、内容/Schema 建议、证据台账，以及带 quality-report.json 自检的四格式报告。
entries.long_en: Diagnoses how well public pages can be discovered, parsed, and cited by AI search systems, with implementation-ready code, content, and schema fixes.
entries.long_zh: 诊断公开页面被 AI 搜索系统发现、解析与引用的程度，给出可直接落地的代码、内容与 Schema 修复建议。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat page optimization, not manipulation. Manifest declares requires_web: true; it fetches the target URL and prefers official/standards/research sources for evidence. Bundles Python3 scripts (scripts/polish_docx.py for Word typography, scripts/review_report_layout.py for layout checks). Reads the target page plus user inputs and writes Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown reports; default output language is Simplified Chinese.
entries.sec_note_zh: 属白帽页面优化，非操纵。manifest 声明 requires_web: true；会抓取目标 URL，并优先以官方/标准/研究类来源作为证据。打包了 Python3 脚本（scripts/polish_docx.py 处理 Word 排版，scripts/review_report_layout.py 做版式检查）。读取目标页面及用户输入、写出 Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown 报告；默认输出语言为简体中文。

entries.name: GEO Page Blueprint
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: Designs a GEO-friendly page blueprint for a product, topic, ranking, comparison, FAQ, knowledge-base, or case page, producing query fan-out coverage, information architecture, AI-extractable modules, semantic HTML, Schema candidates, a CMS field list, and a four-format report.
entries.description_zh: 为产品、专题、榜单、对比、FAQ、知识库或案例页设计 GEO 友好的页面蓝图，产出查询 fan-out 覆盖、信息架构、AI 可抽取模块、语义化 HTML、Schema 候选、CMS 字段清单与四格式报告。
entries.long_en: Turns content goals into implementable page structure that serves AI answer extraction, real readers, and conversion at once.
entries.long_zh: 把内容目标落成可实施的页面结构，同时服务 AI 答案抽取、真实读者阅读与转化。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat page design, not manipulation. Manifest declares requires_web: false; web access is only an optional 'assisted-web-research' data mode and otherwise it plans from user-supplied source packs. Bundles a Python3 script (scripts/render_yao_geo_page_blueprint.py) that renders the four-format (Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF) report from report_input.json. Schema candidates are constrained to facts present on the page (no fabricated ratings/prices). Default output language is Simplified Chinese.
entries.sec_note_zh: 属白帽页面设计，非操纵。manifest 声明 requires_web: false；联网仅是可选的 “assisted-web-research” 数据模式，否则基于用户提供的来源包进行规划。打包了一个 Python3 脚本（scripts/render_yao_geo_page_blueprint.py），从 report_input.json 渲染四格式（Markdown/HTML/Word/PDF）报告。Schema 候选受限于页面已有事实（不伪造评分/价格）。默认输出语言为简体中文。

entries.name: GEO Panorama Audit
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: Runs a full-brand GEO baseline audit by crawling the brand's official site, cross-verifying claims against public sources, and producing a 12-domain diagnosis with an onsite/offsite opportunity map and priorities, delivered as Word, PDF, HTML, and Markdown.
entries.description_zh: 通过抓取品牌官网、用公开信源交叉核验断言，做一次全品牌 GEO 基线诊断，产出 12 个诊断域的报告、站内/站外机会地图与优先级，交付 Word、PDF、HTML、Markdown 四格式。
entries.long_en: Establishes a brand's GEO baseline so content is discoverable and citable by AI answer engines, with evidence-backed onsite and offsite action plans.
entries.long_zh: 为品牌建立 GEO 基线，让内容可被 AI 答案引擎发现与引用，并给出有证据支撑的站内、站外行动方案。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization, not manipulation. Needs web access to crawl the brand's official site and cross-verify public sources (manifest diagnosis_basis: official-site-crawl-and-cross-verification). No bundled scripts; the agent generates the four-format (Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown) reports itself. Reads brand-supplied inputs and writes report files; default output language is Simplified Chinese.
entries.sec_note_zh: 属白帽内容优化，非操纵。需要联网抓取品牌官网并交叉核验公开信源（manifest 诊断口径为 official-site-crawl-and-cross-verification）。不含打包脚本；四格式（Word/PDF/HTML/Markdown）报告由 agent 自行生成。读取用户提供的品牌资料、写出报告文件；默认输出语言为简体中文。

entries.name: GEO Ranking Article Builder
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: Turns a brand brief, topic config, keywords, competitor set, and trusted sources into a traceable GEO ranking/review article (best/top/alternatives/vs/persona/use-case) with scoring methodology, comparison table, FAQ, and a sources table, delivered as Markdown, HTML, PDF, and Word.
entries.description_zh: 把品牌 Brief、选题配置、关键词、竞品库和可信来源转成可追溯的 GEO 榜单评测文章（best/top/alternatives/vs/persona/use-case），含评选方法、核心对比表、FAQ 与来源表，并交付 Markdown、HTML、PDF、Word 四格式。
entries.long_en: Produce evidence-backed ranking content for domestic AI platforms where TOP picks need multi-source support and the target brand earns rank only through evidence.
entries.long_zh: 为国内 AI 平台产出证据支撑的榜单内容，TOP 名次需多源支持，目标品牌只能凭证据获得排名。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization, not fake review-stuffing or detection evasion; it must not fabricate competitors, force the target brand to rank first, or use unsourced data/awards/prices. Bundles Python scripts: audit_sources.py checks whether Markdown URLs are reachable (requires web access) and render_ranking_article_pack.py builds the four-format pack. Public-data collection only; it explicitly does not bypass login, paywalls, anti-crawl limits, or private-system permissions.
entries.sec_note_zh: 白帽内容优化，非刷好评或检测规避；不得虚构竞品、硬排目标品牌第一或使用无来源数据/奖项/价格。捆绑 Python 脚本：audit_sources.py 检查 Markdown 中 URL 是否可访问（需联网），render_ranking_article_pack.py 生成四格式包。仅采集公开数据，明确不绕过登录、付费墙、反爬限制或私有系统权限。

entries.name: GEO Title Optimizer
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: Generates, scores, and compliance-checks GEO title candidates for Chinese AI search platforms, mapping each title to an article structure and exporting Markdown, HTML, DOCX, and PDF reports.
entries.description_zh: 为国内 AI 搜索平台生成、评分并做合规审查 GEO 标题候选，将每个标题映射到文章结构，并导出 Markdown、HTML、DOCX、PDF 四格式报告。
entries.long_en: Turn a keyword brief into compliant, well-scored GEO titles tuned for DeepSeek, Kimi, Doubao, Yuanbao, and Tongyi Qianwen.
entries.long_zh: 把关键词简报转成合规、可评分、适配 DeepSeek/Kimi/豆包/元宝/通义千问的 GEO 标题方案。
entries.sec_note_en: White-hat content optimization for AI answer engines, not detection evasion. Bundles Python scripts: render_yao_geo_title_optimizer.py builds the four-format report from a report JSON, and collect_yao_geo_title_evidence.py optionally fetches public URLs to snapshot status code, title, and meta (requires web access). The evidence collector explicitly does not bypass authentication, paywalls, robots, or anti-bot rules; domestic AI platform answers must be supplied via API or manual export, not auto-scraped.
entries.sec_note_zh: 面向 AI 答案引擎的白帽内容优化，非检测规避。捆绑 Python 脚本：render_yao_geo_title_optimizer.py 从报告 JSON 生成四格式报告，collect_yao_geo_title_evidence.py 可选抓取公开 URL 以快照状态码、标题与 meta（需联网）。证据采集脚本明确不绕过登录、付费墙、robots 或反爬规则；国内 AI 平台答案需经 API 或人工导出，不自动抓取。

entries.name: GEO Attribution & Tracking Planner
entries.author: yaojingang
entries.description_en: From a company name plus optional supporting info, designs a company-specific GEO backend tracking and attribution PLAN: official-site verification, business-type and conversion-path mapping, direct-vs-indirect effect modeling, an observability estimation framework, data-model and metrics design, a prioritized roadmap, and optional rendered HTML and Word reports.
entries.description_zh: 从公司名加可选补充信息出发，设计该公司专属的 GEO 后端效果跟踪与归因方案：官网核验、业务类型与转化链路映射、直接/间接效果双层建模、可观测性估算框架、数据模型与指标口径设计、优先级路线图，并可选生成 HTML 与 Word 报告。
entries.long_en: Produces a tailored, evidence-anchored GEO attribution design and tracking roadmap, including an honest observability boundary, rather than a generic methodology template.
entries.long_zh: 产出针对该企业、以证据为锚的 GEO 归因设计与跟踪路线图，并诚实给出可观测性边界，而非通用方法论套话。
entries.sec_note_en: Performs authoritative web retrieval anchored on the official website when online (confirms the official domain and reads public homepage/product/about/contact/pricing/case pages); explicitly degrades to a low-confidence, user-material-only version when offline. Bundles a Python renderer (render_yao_geo_tracking.py) that writes .html and .docx from a report_input.json. Output is a planning/attribution-design document, not a live data collector; the skill is explicitly open-source sanitized and forbids any private CLI, intranet address, or internal company data.
entries.sec_note_zh: 联网时以官网为核心做权威检索（先确认官方域名，再读取公开的首页/产品页/关于页/联系页/定价页/案例页）；不能联网时显式降级为仅基于用户材料的低置信度版本。捆绑 Python 渲染器 render_yao_geo_tracking.py，从 report_input.json 生成 .html 与 .docx。产物是规划/归因设计文档，而非实时数据采集器；该 skill 已做开源脱敏，禁止任何私有 CLI、内网地址或公司内部数据。

entries.name: UI/UX Pro Max
entries.author: nextlevelbuilder
entries.description_en: A Claude Code plugin that injects design intelligence into coding agents—84 styles, 161 color palettes, 73 font pairings, charts and stacks—plus a Design System Generator that turns a project brief into a tailored, production-ready design system.
entries.description_zh: 一个为编码 agent 注入「设计智能」的 Claude Code 插件——84 种风格、161 套配色、73 组字体搭配、图表与技术栈，外加一个「设计系统生成器」，能把项目需求一键转成可上线的定制设计系统。
entries.long_en: UI/UX Pro Max equips a coding agent with structured design knowledge so its UI output looks deliberate instead of generic. Its flagship Design System Generator runs parallel domain searches over the brief and recommends a coherent system—layout pattern, style direction, color palette, typography, effects, anti-patterns to avoid, and a pre-delivery accessibility checklist (contrast, focus states, reduced-motion, responsive breakpoints). It spans many platforms and frameworks (React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Angular, Three.js) and covers styles from glassmorphism and bento grids to brutalism and minimalism. A common workflow is to ask it for several distinct style directions up front, pick one, and build from there.
entries.long_zh: UI/UX Pro Max 为编码 agent 注入结构化的设计知识，让它产出的界面显得「有意为之」而非千篇一律。其旗舰功能「设计系统生成器」会围绕需求做多领域并行检索，给出一套自洽的系统——布局范式、风格方向、配色、字体、视觉效果、应避免的反模式，以及一份上线前无障碍清单（对比度、焦点态、reduced-motion、响应式断点）。覆盖众多平台与框架（React、Next.js、Vue、Nuxt、Svelte、Astro、SwiftUI、React Native、Flutter、Tailwind、shadcn/ui、Jetpack Compose、Angular、Three.js），风格从玻璃拟态、bento 网格到野兽派、极简皆有。常见用法是先让它给出几个不同风格方向，挑一个再往下做。
entries.sec_note_en: MIT-licensed; runs locally as a Claude Code plugin. It is design guidance plus a CLI and produces frontend code—review generated code before shipping. No external service is required for the design knowledge itself.
entries.sec_note_zh: MIT 许可；作为 Claude Code 插件在本地运行。它是设计指引加一个 CLI，并会产出前端代码——上线前请审阅生成的代码。设计知识本身不依赖外部服务。

entries.name: Claude-Mem
entries.author: thedotmack
entries.description_en: A Claude Code plugin that gives coding agents persistent memory across sessions—it captures session activity, compresses it into semantic summaries, and injects relevant context back into future sessions so the agent remembers prior decisions and where it left off.
entries.description_zh: 一个为编码 agent 提供「跨 session 持久记忆」的 Claude Code 插件——它捕获会话活动，压缩成语义摘要，并在未来的 session 中注入相关上下文，让 agent 记得之前的决策与上次卡在哪里。
entries.long_en: Claude-Mem preserves context across sessions so a long-running project doesn't restart from zero each time. It hooks the session lifecycle (SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PostToolUse, Stop, SessionEnd) to record tool-usage observations, generates semantic summaries of what happened, and surfaces relevant memories at the start of later sessions. Storage is local—SQLite for sessions/observations/summaries plus a Chroma vector database for hybrid semantic + keyword retrieval—and a local worker service (HTTP on port 37777) exposes a web viewer and search endpoints. Agents query memory through MCP search tools (search → timeline → get_observations) with progressive disclosure to save tokens. Works with Claude Code and other agents (Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Codex, and more).
entries.long_zh: Claude-Mem 让长期项目不必每次从零开始：它挂接会话生命周期（SessionStart、UserPromptSubmit、PostToolUse、Stop、SessionEnd）记录工具使用观测，生成语义摘要，并在后续 session 开始时浮现相关记忆。存储全在本地——用 SQLite 存会话/观测/摘要，用 Chroma 向量库做语义 + 关键词混合检索——并由一个本地 worker 服务（HTTP 端口 37777）提供 Web 查看器与检索端点。Agent 通过 MCP 检索工具（search → timeline → get_observations）以渐进披露方式查询记忆、节省 token。支持 Claude Code 及其它 agent（Gemini CLI、OpenCode、Codex 等）。
entries.sec_note_en: Apache-2.0. By design it records your session activity (tool usage and observations) and stores it in a local SQLite + Chroma database; it also runs a local worker HTTP service on port 37777 with a web viewer. Data stays on your machine and summarization uses your own Claude, but because it captures everything the agent does, review the hooks and the worker service before enabling—especially on shared or sensitive projects. Requires the Bun runtime.
entries.sec_note_zh: Apache-2.0。其设计本身就会记录你的会话活动（工具使用与观测）并存入本地 SQLite + Chroma 数据库；同时在本机 37777 端口运行一个带 Web 查看器的 worker 服务。数据留在本地、摘要使用你自己的 Claude，但由于它会捕获 agent 的全部操作，启用前请审查其 hooks 与 worker 服务——尤其在共享或敏感项目上。需要 Bun 运行时。

entries.name: Council of High Intelligence
entries.author: 0xNyk
entries.description_en: Convenes a council of 18 historical-thinker personas (Aristotle, Feynman, Kahneman, Torvalds and more) to deliberate your hardest decisions in a structured multi-round debate—optionally fanned across multiple LLM providers for genuine model diversity. One command: /council.
entries.description_zh: 召集 18 位历史思想家人格(亚里士多德、费曼、卡尼曼、Torvalds 等)组成「议会」,通过结构化多轮辩论审议你最棘手的决策——可选地把成员分散到多个 LLM 提供方运行,获得真正的模型多样性。一条命令:/council。
entries.long_en: A /council slash-command skill that runs a coordinator-driven deliberation: each persona first analyzes the problem blind (no peer outputs), then cross-examines under anonymized labels to curb conformity bias, then crystallizes a position into a counted, domain-weighted vote tally that a separate Chairman synthesizes into an auditable verdict (consensus, minority report, kill criteria, one concrete next step). Modes scale to the question—full (all 18), triad, duo dialectic, or a 2-round quick pass—and built-in enforcement scans require dissent and novelty so the panel can't just agree. When multiple model CLIs are present (Anthropic, OpenAI/Codex, Gemini, Ollama, NVIDIA NIM, Cursor) it auto-routes polarity-paired members onto different providers; with only Claude it falls back to Anthropic models. It is an orchestration/prompt skill—it reasons and synthesizes, it does not ship code.
entries.long_zh: 一个 /council 斜杠命令技能,由协调者驱动多轮审议:每位人格先「盲审」(看不到同伴输出)独立分析,再以匿名标签互相质询以抑制从众偏差,最后把立场凝练为一份计票、按领域加权的投票表,由独立的「主席」综合成可审计的裁决(共识、少数派报告、否决条件、唯一的具体下一步)。模式按问题规模可选:full(全部 18 人)、triad(三人组)、duo(二元对辩)或两轮 quick 快审;内置强制扫描要求出现异议与新论点,避免一团和气。当本机存在多个模型 CLI(Anthropic、OpenAI/Codex、Gemini、Ollama、NVIDIA NIM、Cursor)时,会把对立人格自动分配到不同提供方;仅有 Claude 时回退到 Anthropic 模型。它是编排/提示词技能——负责推理与综合,不产出代码。
entries.sec_note_en: MIT-licensed; runs locally as a Claude Code (also Codex/Gemini) skill. It is more than a single SKILL.md—the 18 council personas live as separate agent files, and the repo's install.sh places them under ~/.claude/agents/ plus a bash detect-providers.sh script; a coordinator-only copy loses the member personas. In its optional multi-provider mode the coordinator shells out to external CLIs (codex, gemini, ollama, cursor-agent) and makes HTTPS calls to OpenAI-compatible endpoints (e.g. NVIDIA NIM), sending your problem text to those third-party models; API keys are read from env vars, never inlined. Claude-only mode makes no external calls. A full run can spawn up to 18 subagents over several rounds, so expect high token usage.
entries.sec_note_zh: MIT 许可;作为 Claude Code(也支持 Codex/Gemini)技能在本地运行。它不止一个 SKILL.md——18 位议会人格是独立的 agent 文件,仓库的 install.sh 会把它们装到 ~/.claude/agents/,并附带一个 bash 的 detect-providers.sh 脚本;只复制协调者会丢失成员人格。在可选的多提供方模式下,协调者会调用外部 CLI(codex、gemini、ollama、cursor-agent)并向 OpenAI 兼容端点(如 NVIDIA NIM)发起 HTTPS 请求,把你的问题文本发送给这些第三方模型;API key 从环境变量读取,绝不内联。仅 Claude 模式不产生任何外部调用。一次完整运行可能在多轮中派生多达 18 个子 agent,token 消耗较高。

entries.name: Bottleneck Hunter
entries.author: xbtlin
entries.description_en: AI-driven global supply-chain bottleneck scanner for value investors. Identifies choke points, maps upstream/downstream impacts, and turns them into actionable investment theses.
entries.description_zh: AI 驱动的全球产业链瓶颈猎手，帮助价值投资者识别供应链卡脖子节点、梳理上下游影响并转化为可投资论点。
entries.long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It scouts global supply-chain choke points, quantifies upstream/downstream ripple effects, and frames bottleneck discoveries as long/short investment theses with risk checks.
entries.long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。它扫描全球产业链瓶颈，量化上下游传导影响，并把瓶颈发现转化为附带风险检查的多空投资论点。
entries.sec_note_en: Runs local Python tools from the repo's tools/ directory and performs web searches for supply-chain data. No external accounts required; verify data sources before trading.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会运行仓库 tools/ 目录下的本地 Python 工具，并为供应链数据执行网络搜索。无需外部账号；交易前请核实数据来源。

entries.name: Deep Company Series
entries.author: xbtlin
entries.description_en: Produce an 8-part deep-dive research series on a single company, covering business, moat, management, industry, risks, valuation, thesis, and action plan.
entries.description_zh: 针对一家公司产出 8 篇深度研究系列，覆盖生意本质、护城河、管理层、行业、风险、估值、投资论文与行动计划。
entries.long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It breaks one company into eight long-form research pieces, each with explicit pass/fail/gray conclusions and price-range guidance.
entries.long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。把一家公司拆成八篇长文研究，每篇都给出明确的通过/不通过/灰色结论与价格区间建议。
entries.sec_note_en: Runs local Python tools from tools/ and performs web searches for financial data. No external accounts required; verify valuation inputs before investing.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会运行 tools/ 下的本地 Python 工具，并为财务数据执行网络搜索。无需外部账号；投资前请核实估值输入。

entries.name: Duan Yongping Ask
entries.author: xbtlin
entries.description_en: Answer investment questions in the style of Duan Yongping: focus on the right business, the right people, and the right price, with plain-language discipline.
entries.description_zh: 以段永平的方式回答投资问题：聚焦对的生意、对的人、对的价格，用大白话保持投资纪律。
entries.long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It frames decisions through Duan Yongping's lens—differentiation, pricing power, management integrity, and margin of safety—and refuses to hedge with vague answers.
entries.long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。用段永平的视角框定决策——差异化、定价权、管理层诚信、安全边际——并拒绝用模棱两可的话来打太极。
entries.sec_note_en: Performs web searches for public information and reads local files. No external accounts or credentials required.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会执行网络搜索获取公开信息并读取本地文件。无需外部账号或凭据。

entries.name: Earnings Review
entries.author: xbtlin
entries.description_en: Deep-read an earnings report through the four-masters lens: business quality, moat, management, and valuation, with first-hand data cross-checks.
entries.description_zh: 以四大师视角深度精读财报：生意质量、护城河、管理层与估值，交叉验证一手数据。
entries.long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It dissects a quarterly or annual earnings report using Buffett, Munger, Duan Yongping, and Li Lu's frameworks, cross-checks figures with local tools, and outputs a buy/hold/sell signal.
